scripts.generate:ios: npm run build -w @astralops/transcript-web && node apps/ios/scripts/build-web-assets.mjs && (cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate)
scripts.build: npm run build -w protocol && npm run build -w @astralops/transcript && npm run build -w @astralops/transcript-web && npm run build -w @astralops/workbench-state && npm run build -w @astralops/i18n && npm run build -w @astralops/controller-client && npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run build -w apps/mobile && go build ./daemon ./proxy-agent ./relay
scripts.check: npm run generate:protocol && git diff --exit-code protocol/src/generated.ts && npm run check -w protocol && npm run check -w @astralops/transcript && npm run check -w @astralops/transcript-web && npm run check -w @astralops/workbench-state && npm run check -w @astralops/i18n && npm run check -w @astralops/controller-client && npm run check -w apps/desktop && npm run check -w apps/mobile && go test ./...
